hero.description: I’m a professional web developer in Morocco creating modern, SEO-optimized websites and automated AI business systems. I also design high-converting social media ads. My focus is simple: performance, scalability, and real results for growing businesses.
hero.profile_role: Full-Stack Developer, SEO Specialist & AI Automation
hero.mission: My mission is to assist startups and enterprises in creating an emotional bond between their products and satisfied, engaged customers.

goal.title: Why me?
goal.description: We help startups, enterprises, and entrepreneurs build a strong digital presence and connect effectively with their customers. By combining modern design, SEO-optimized development, and smart business solutions, we create websites and systems that increase visibility, improve efficiency, and support long-term growth.

about_me.subtitle: Your partner for digital success
about_me.paragraph1: I'm a professional developer and designer based in Morocco, specializing in website creation, operating systems, and media image design. I help businesses and startups build a strong online presence with modern, fast, and SEO-friendly solutions.
about_me.paragraph2: Whether you need a custom website, a business system, or eye-catching visuals for social media and ads, I focus on quality, clear communication, and results that grow your brand.

why_we_are.subtitle: What makes us different
why_we_are.description: We help startups and businesses build a strong digital presence through modern, SEO-optimized websites and smart solutions that drive growth.

web.title: Modern Web Development
web.description: Lightweight, fast websites built for search engines. I create SEO-optimized, mobile-first sites that rank well and convert visitors into customers. Ideal for businesses going online or refreshing their presence.

systems.description: Custom automation and AI integration to streamline operations. From workflow automation to intelligent tools, I help you save time and scale without extra overhead.

reasons.text: Websites and systems that rank, convert, and scale — with real results for startups and SMBs.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Your partner for digital success
about.heading: Developer & designer focused on real results
about.intro: I'm a professional developer and designer based in Morocco. I don't build for big agencies — I work with startups, medium-sized businesses, and anyone selling or promoting online who needs a strong web presence, automation, or AI in their operations.
about.paragraph1: I build lightweight, SEO-optimized websites that rank well in search engines, and I design media and ad creatives that showcase your services or products. Whether you need a new site, automation, or visuals for your social pages, I focus on quality, clear communication, and outcomes that grow your brand.
about.paragraph2: My approach combines modern tech, performance, and clarity. I help you reach more customers, automate repetitive tasks, and present your offer in a way that converts.

whoIAm.title: Who I Am
whoIAm.text: I'm Mohammed — a full-stack developer, SEO specialist, and designer with a passion for turning ideas into high-performing digital products. I work with startups and SMBs who want to stand out online: from ranking on Google to automating workflows and designing ads that convert. I believe in clean code, clear communication, and results you can measure.

storyMissionValues.title: Discover the story, mission, and values that drive me
storyMissionValues.story: My journey started with a curiosity for how the web works and how businesses can use it to grow. Over the years I've built websites, automated processes, and designed campaigns for brands that needed a partner who could both code and design — and deliver on time.
storyMissionValues.mission: My mission is to help businesses and creators build a strong, visible online presence. I want every project to be fast, findable, and focused on the user — so you can focus on what you do best while your digital presence works for you.
values: Quality over quantity — every line of code and every pixel matters.
Transparency — you're always in the loop, from kickoff to launch.
Performance — lightweight, SEO-friendly, and built to last.
Partnership — I succeed when your business grows.

howCanIHelp.title: How Can I Help?
howCanIHelp.subtitle: Ways we can work together
items: Build or redesign your website — fast, SEO-optimized, and mobile-first.
Set up automation and AI tools to save you time and scale your operations.
Design ad creatives and social media visuals that explain your offer and drive sales.
Audit and improve your existing site's speed, SEO, and conversion.
Train your team or support you with ongoing maintenance and updates.
